daily.today_energy: Your mind is buzzing with creative possibilities today, Gemini. There's a restless, electric vibe asking you to explore something new—whether that's a conversation, hobby, or just a different route home. Trust the curiosity.
daily.love: Someone's noticing your energy right now. If you're single, a chance encounter could spark something genuine. If coupled, your partner's craving more of that witty banter you do so well. Keep it real and playful.
daily.career: Ideas are flowing faster than you can catch them. Channel that mental agility into one solid project instead of scattering yourself. Your ability to connect dots others miss is your superpower today—use it strategically.
daily.health: Your nervous system's asking for grounding. Try some slow breathing or movement that feels good—nothing rigid. Your body thrives when your mind isn't in five places at once. Be gentle with yourself today.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is asking you to slow down and actually listen to what people are saying instead of already planning your response. Mercury's got your back, but the real magic happens when you practice presence over performance.
weekly.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, this is a week to be honest about what you actually want versus what sounds good on paper. Someone might surprise you with genuine effort—notice it.
weekly.career: Your ideas are valuable, but timing matters more than you think. Before pitching that thing, vibe-check the room first. Small moves this week set up bigger momentum later.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for consistency over intensity right now. Skip the extreme stuff and lean into what actually feels sustainable. Rest isn't lazy, it's strategic.
